name: insertRichLink
description: Inserts a Google Docs rich link smart chip at a specific paragraph location. Use for Google resource links such as Drive files or Calendar events.

documentId.description: The document ID — the long string between /d/ and /edit in a Google Docs URL.

index.description: 1-based character index within an existing paragraph where the rich link should be inserted.

uri.description: URI of the Google resource for the rich link smart chip.

mimeType.description: Optional MIME type of the linked resource, if known.

title.description: Optional title hint. Google Docs may still resolve and display the canonical resource title.
